name: World Legacy Clash
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>を<ruby lang="jp"><rb>巡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>る<ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たたか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc: Banish 1 face-up monster you control (until the End Phase), then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; that target loses ATK/DEF equal to the original ATK/DEF of that banished monster.
eff: Banish 1 face-up monster you control (until the End Phase), then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; that target loses ATK/DEF equal to the original ATK/DEF of that banished monster.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
